title: crossing lines
body:
on january 5th, 2023 you used similar pages extension to link crossing lines to songs

https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/03102022-crossing-lines



i make drake sound like family guy
kendrick like degrassi high
when i spit
can i kick it without crossing lines
that's not in my horoscope
i'm a gemini plus a water sign
and that's just on my father's side
there's more to me
inside i'm a god that disorders time
chops it up to stop it from eating all the time
i'm not stuck
i'm the glue that holds the line
the tie that binds
i like minds
so i stretch to see the point that draws the sight lines
i sketch just to see the line the point draws
i draw just to see the look on your face
cuz i'm not sure if this is a gun or an anthem
and i don't get answers just cuz your dancing
i love that for you but i'm not a madman
i can't take chances what i got my hand in
cuz i'm trigger happy
like my music trippy trappy choppy
fluid slippery hoppy hippie
like my feedback snappy
gimme what you got
do it quickly
sorry if i'm actin aggie
i got what i got and it gets at me
so i shoot my shot and see what happens
all the reports said was people keep clappin
i had to see who wasn't dead
but you just see me scrappin
in clothes i've scavenged
and i can't remember which i have and which i haven't
it wasn't any different when i was living lavish
nothing fit if i didn't knit it in my own fashion
so i'm always picking at the used clothes bin
kitted in someone else's image
if you're offended by a gimmick, i get it
the world got dark
i didn't but that isn't the important part
you got feelings and i know better than to ignore the heart
what is it, i'm listening
